sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and (GL is null or GL like '232%')
Update x set Crcy = y.Field1 From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Swap' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.GL = y.GL from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and y.GL = substring('[BudAct]',1,7) where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL  = substring('[BudAct]',1,7)

Update x set x.Crcy = y.Crcy, x.Period = y.Period from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Crcy = 'X' and y.GL = 'X' and x.Period is null and not y.Period is NULL and y.Ledger in ('IF','Z003','Z004','Z007','Z014','Z015','Z018','Z023')  where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY '

Update x set x.Crcy = y.Crcy, x.Period = y.Period from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Crcy = 'X' and y.GL = 'X' and x.Period is null and not y.Period is NULL and y.Ledger in ('LG','Z006','Z007','Z009','Z014','Z015','Z016')  where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '

Update x set x.Crcy = y.Crcy, x.Period = y.Period from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Crcy = 'X' and y.GL = 'X' and x.Period is null and not y.Period is NULL and y.Ledger in ('LS','Z006','Z008','Z015','Z016')  where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL  = 'X'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Crcy  = 'X'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and (GL like '2822%' or GL like '222%')

Update x set x.Flex6 = y.Flex6 from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.KeyID = y.KeyID and x.Yr = y.Yr and x.CC = y.CC and x.CatCode = y.CatCode and not x.Period is null and y.Period is NULL  where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Period is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and (Co > '5000' or Co in ('2101','2102','2103','2500','4025','4030'))
Update TransX set Period = '12' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Period = '16'
Update x set x.Amt1 = x.Amt1 * 100 from TransX x inner join Crcy y on x.Crcy = y.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and y.DecimalPlaces = 0
Update TransX set Amt1 = Amt1 / 10 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Crcy in ('BHD','JOD','KWD','TND','OMR','LYD','IQD')
Update TransX set Contract = Assgnmt  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Yr < '2022' and Co like '3%'
Update TransX set contract = 'UNKNOWN', UWYR = '2010' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR < '2011' and UWYR <> ''
Update TransX set contract = 'UNKNOWN' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and len(contract) = 8 and contract like '20%'
Update TransX set contract = 'UNKNOWN' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and contract in ('','US GAAP UW RESULT')
Update TransX set UWYR = '1959' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR = ''
Update TransX set UWYR = '1958' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR = '9999'

Update t set Co = '3030', Amt2 = round(Amt2*r1.Rate/r2.Rate,2) from TransX t inner join Companies c on c.Co = t.Co inner join CrcyRates r1 on r1.Crcy = c.Crcy and r1.Typ = 'S' and r1.EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from (select EffDate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'S' and Crcy = 'GBP' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]') a) inner join CrcyRates r2 on r2.Crcy = 'GBP' and r2.Typ = 'S' and r2.EffDate = r1.EffDate where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Co in ('3060','3100')
Update TransX set Flex8 = '', Flex2 = '', Flex3 = '', Flex4 = '', Flex5 = '', Flex6 = coalesce(Flex6,''), Flex7 = '', Flex9 = '', BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set x.Flex8 = y.Field1, x.Flex2 = y.Field2, x.Flex3 = y.Field3 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on replace(replace(substring(GL,1,3),'231','131'),'148','221') = y.ID and TransCode = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'W13 GL'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not coalesce(TransCode,'') = ''
Update TransX set Flex2 = '00-OPENBAL' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '100'
Update TransX set Flex2 = '05-CASH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('804','806')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '06-CEDCOM' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '802' and TransCode in ('T0014','T0017','T0058','T0060')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '09-FX' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (TTY like '9%' or substring(GL,6,2) in ('96','98'))
Update TransX set Flex2 = '01-PW' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and TTY = '801'
Update TransX set Flex2 = '04-ACQ' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and TTY = '802'
Update TransX set Flex2 = '02-CLM' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and TTY = '803'
Update TransX set Flex2 = '05-CASH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and TTY in ('804','807','808','809')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '01-PW' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('13','23')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '02-CLM' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = '' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','22','28')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '05-CASH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('805','808') and TransCode in ('T0008','T0014','T0048')
Update TransX set Flex2 = '05-CASH' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('805','811','812') and TransCode = ''
Update x set x.Flex4 = y.Descr from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on Flex2 = y.ID and y.Table_ID = 'W13 Grp2'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex2 = ''
Update x set x.Flex5 = y.Descr from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on Flex3 = y.ID and y.Table_ID = 'W13 Grp3'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex3 = ''
Update TransX set TP = (case when substring(FSitem,1,2) = '00' then substring(FSitem,3,4) else Fsitem end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1, Amt2 = -Amt2, Amt3 = -Amt3 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = 'H'
Update x set Flex7 = y.Assgnmt from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.Co = y.Co and x.Assgnmt = y.Flex6 and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.UWYR = y.UWYR where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex6 = 'self flip', Flex7 = 'self flip' from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Assgnmt = y.Assgnmt and round(x.Amt3 + y.Amt3,2) = 0 where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex6 = '' and x.Flex7 = '' and x.TTY = '806' and y.Flex6 = '' and y.Flex7 = '' and y.TTY = '806' and ((x.GL like '231%' and y.GL like '148%') or (x.GL like '148%' and y.GL like '231%')) and x.Assgnmt like '%$%'

Update x set Flex6 = 'self 806', Flex7 = 'self 806' from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Assgnmt = y.Assgnmt and round(x.Amt3 + y.Amt3,2) = 0 and substring(x.GL,1,3) = substring(y.GL,1,3) and x.Flex6 = y.Flex6 and x.Flex7 = y.Flex7 and x.TTY = y.TTY where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex6 = '' and x.Flex7 = '' and x.TTY = '806' and abs(cast(x.CatCode as int)-cast(y.CatCode as int))<3

Update x set Flex6 = 'self', Flex7 = 'self' from TransX x inner join TransX y on x.Co = y.Co and x.CC = y.CC and x.Assgnmt = y.Assgnmt and round(x.Amt3 + y.Amt3,2) = 0 and substring(x.GL,1,3) = substring(y.GL,1,3) and x.Flex6 = y.Flex6 and x.Flex7 = y.Flex7 where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex6 = '' and x.Flex7 = '' and abs(cast(x.CatCode as int)-cast(y.CatCode as int))<3

Update x set Amt4 = y.DocBal, Amt5 = y.LCBal, Amt6 = y.LC2Bal from TransX x inner join (select Co,substring(GL,1,3) as GL,CC,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,sum(Amt1) as DocBal,sum(Amt2) as LCBal,sum(Amt3) as LC2Bal from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '' and Flex7 = '' group by Co,substring(GL,1,3),CC,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode) y on x.Co = y.Co and substring(x.GL,1,3) = y.GL and x.CC = y.CC and x.TTY = y.TTY and x.UWYR = y.UWYR and x.Contract = y.Contract and x.TransCode = y.TransCode where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and x.Flex6 = '' and x.Flex7 = ''
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'self TP', Flex7 = 'self TP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '' and Flex7 = '' and coalesce(Amt4,0) = 0 and coalesce(Amt5,0) = 0 and coalesce(Amt6,0) = 0
update TransX set Flex1 = c.Crcy from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.PCdesc = y.Descr, x.Division = y.Program from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Stat = (case when substring(GL,6,2) in ('94','95','96','97','98') then 'E' else 'I' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Stat = 'E' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('990','991')
Update TransX set Stat = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and len(TP) = 4
Update TransX set Stat = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2999','3999')

Update x set Flex9 = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + x.BusCat + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join pctrs p on x.PC = p.pctr inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = p.Product and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex9 = c.Portfolio_PC from TransX x inner join IR17_Contracts c on x.Contract = c.Contract and x.UWYR = c.UWYR and x.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not substring(x.Flex9,2,2) in ('UI','NL','EL') and not x.Co = '2999'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'AnO_Cash', Flex2 = '07-AnOCash' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division = '131' and GL like '231%' and CC like '79%' and Flex4 = 'Cash'
Update TransX set Division = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division is NULL
Update x set Rate1 = c.Rate From TransX x inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Flex1 and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Amt1 = Amt3, Amt2 = round(Amt3/Rate1,2), Flex3 = x.Crcy, Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex9 = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2001' and not '2001 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2001 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2001') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2002' and not '2002 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2002 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2002') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2005' and not '2005 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2005 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2005') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2007' and not '2007 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2007 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2007') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and not '2008 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2008 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2008') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,(Yr * 100 + Period) as YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Co in ('2003','2004','2006','4110') or Co like '22%') and not Co + ' ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select Co + ' ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where (Co in ('2003','2004','2006','4110') or Co like '22%')) ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]

Delete from IR17_CF where cast(Co as varchar(4)) +  cast(YearPeriod as varchar(6)) in (Select distinct cast(Co as varchar(4)) + cast(Yr*100+Period as varchar(6)) from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R66' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_CF (Co,YearPeriod,GL,DocNbr,RowNbr,Crcy,Co_Crcy,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,TransID,AppliedToID,PaidByID,Group1,Group2,Group2_Desc,Group3,Group3_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,Yr*100+Period,GL,CC,CatCode,Crcy,Flex1,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,Assgnmt,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex2,Flex4,Flex3,Flex5,PC,PCdesc,Division,'R66',Stat,BusCat,Flex9 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY '

Delete from IR17_CF_Canada where cast(Co as varchar(4)) +  cast(YearPeriod as varchar(6)) in (Select distinct cast(Co as varchar(4)) + cast(Yr*100+Period as varchar(6)) from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R66' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD ' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_CF_Canada (Co,YearPeriod,GL,DocNbr,RowNbr,Crcy,Co_Crcy,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,TransID,AppliedToID,PaidByID,Group1,Group2,Group2_Desc,Group3,Group3_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,Yr*100+Period,GL,CC,CatCode,Crcy,Flex1,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,Assgnmt,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex2,Flex4,Flex3,Flex5,PC,PCdesc,Division,'R66',Stat,BusCat,Flex9 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '

Delete from IR17_CF_Singapore where cast(Co as varchar(4)) +  cast(YearPeriod as varchar(6)) in (Select distinct cast(Co as varchar(4)) + cast(Yr*100+Period as varchar(6)) from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R66' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_CF_Singapore (Co,YearPeriod,GL,DocNbr,RowNbr,Crcy,Co_Crcy,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,TransID,AppliedToID,PaidByID,Group1,Group2,Group2_Desc,Group3,Group3_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,Yr*100+Period,GL,CC,CatCode,Crcy,Flex1,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,Assgnmt,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex2,Flex4,Flex3,Flex5,PC,PCdesc,Division,'R66',Stat,BusCat,Flex9 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING'

Delete from IR17_CF_HudCAD where cast(Co as varchar(4)) +  cast(YearPeriod as varchar(6)) in (Select distinct cast(Co as varchar(4)) + cast(Yr*100+Period as varchar(6)) from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R66' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_CF_HudCAD (Co,YearPeriod,GL,DocNbr,RowNbr,Crcy,Co_Crcy,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,TransID,AppliedToID,PaidByID,Group1,Group2,Group2_Desc,Group3,Group3_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,Yr*100+Period,GL,CC,CatCode,Crcy,Flex1,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,TP,TTY,UWYR,Contract,TransCode,Assgnmt,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex2,Flex4,Flex3,Flex5,PC,PCdesc,Division,'R66',Stat,BusCat,Flex9 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]
Update IR17_Contracts set Portfolio_PC = SUBSTRING(Portfolio_PC,1,1) + 'UR' + SUBSTRING(Portfolio_PC,4,7) where Co in ('2200','2201') and UWYr < 2025
Update IR17_Contracts set Portfolio_PC = SUBSTRING(Portfolio_PC,1,1) + 'UI' + SUBSTRING(Portfolio_PC,4,7) where Co in ('2200','2201') and UWYr >= 2025
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]
Update IR17_CF set Portfolio_PC = SUBSTRING(Portfolio_PC,1,1) + 'UR' + SUBSTRING(Portfolio_PC,4,7) where Co in ('2200','2201') and UWYr < 2025
Update IR17_CF set Portfolio_PC = SUBSTRING(Portfolio_PC,1,1) + 'UI' + SUBSTRING(Portfolio_PC,4,7) where Co in ('2200','2201') and UWYr >= 2025
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]
